ops.title: Fleet re-stamp: gpt-5.5 → gpt-5.6-sol Models row in repos not yet on the claude-rules import
ops.description: Pull-model repos inherit the new row automatically: the central guide (cc-skills plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md, updated 2026-07-11, commit 247c9384) now carries the gpt-5.6-sol row (luna sanctioned for rote/bulk, service_tier=fast pinned on every variant, ultra execution mode named as the future retry rung) and daily crons/dispatch re-render consumers. Repos still carrying a LOCAL CLAUDE.md stamp show the stale gpt-5.5 row until they migrate to the pull model or get a direct edit. Known local-stamp repos from the 2026-07-10 sweep: bioqa, cc-orchestrate, cc-vigil, claude-pool, daily, ego, fly-me-to-the-moon, fusekit, fusekit-f1amend, room-scan, semisweet, stream-trade, write-like-me, yasyf.com, yclaw, repo-sync — re-verify each against its .claude/cc-guides.toml before editing (layouts moved in the v3.1 migration). Direct-edit recipe, three swaps per repo: (1) the '| gpt-5.5 | 9 | 8 | 5 |' row → copy the gpt-5.6-sol row verbatim from the central guide; (2) check-back paragraph 'gpt-5.5 does not' → 'gpt-5.6 does not'; (3) Effort paragraph 'routes to gpt-5.5' → 'routes to gpt-5.6-sol'. Phrases that must survive verbatim: 'count as same-tier', '**Check back on the unexpected.**', 'never down-route writing'. Per-repo gate: git grep -n 'gpt-5.5' -- ':(exclude)CHANGELOG.md' clean, then commit+push. Preconditions all shipped: capt-hook v9.1.0 (general pack 0.17.0), codex plugin 0.11.0, repo-bootstrap 0.43.0.

ops.text: grep of every active repo's root CLAUDE.md finds zero 'gpt-5.5'
